sql-v2.title: SQL Foundations
sql-v2.moreComingSoon: More SQL Foundations lessons are coming soon.

sql-v2-0.title: Getting Started with SQL and Databases
sql-v2-0.description: Build the learner's mental model before syntax: what SQL is, how databases organize information, and how questions become queries.
outcomes: Explain what SQL is used for in real applications.
Identify tables, rows, columns, records, and fields.
Read simple table data and describe what it means.
Use the browser SQL workspace to run a beginner query.
why: Builds confidence with getting started with sql and databases.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql-v2-0-1.title: What SQL Is
sql-v2-0-1.description: Learn what sql means through focused examples and practice.
